creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
- Update to 3.2.0
- Added patch to file dsptools
- Rename old incorrect names of patch files
- Changed pkg-plist that makes reference to net/linphone-base
- Changed pkg-plist.gui that makes reference to net/linphone
- Take maintainership.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-coreapi_linphonecore.c
- files/patch-gtk-glade_Makefile.in
- files/patch-mediastreamer2_src_dsptools.c
- files/patch-mediastreamer2_src_ice.c

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-coreapi::linphonecore.c
- files/patch-gtk-glade__Makefile.in
- files/patch-mediastreamer2__src__ice.c
